signals.headline: Russia Reiterates Offer to Take Iran's Enriched Uranium for Peace Deal | NO (standing proposal, not new confirmation) |

Russia Reiterates Offer to Take Iran's Enriched Uranium for Peace Deal | NO (standing proposal, not new confirmation) | MED confidence**

signals.raw:
Putin Declares Brief Easter Ceasefire in Ukraine (April 11-12), Fuels Speculation on Iran Shift | NO (not Iran-related resolution) | HIGH confidence**  
Russia announced a 1-day Ukraine ceasefire for Orthodox Easter, prompting speculation of redirected focus to Iran's crisis, but no confirmed pivot or joint action was resolved.[1] Zelenskyy expressed skepticism, citing past failed truces.[1]
